## What This PR Does

One to three sentences in imperative mood. State the change and (if
not obvious) why.

## Related Issues

Closes #
Refs #

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Test only
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Spec change (RFC referenced below)

## Testing

How did you verify the change? Commands run, scenarios covered.

```bash
# example
cargo test -p bock-lexer
```

## Breaking Changes

- [ ] None
- [ ] Yes — describe below and confirm CHANGELOG impact

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] Docs updated (if behavior or surface changed)
- [ ] `cargo fmt`, `cargo clippy -D warnings`, `cargo test` pass locally
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry will be auto-added on merge from this PR title
